items.title: My elderly mother has dementia. My sister sold her house and has hidden the proceeds. What can we do?
items.description: “My sister is planning to move out of state and feels it is her right to control the money.”

items.title: Micron’s stock climbs on this fresh sign of booming memory prices
items.description: Lenovo said memory prices went up 40% to 50% in the last quarter — and they could double this quarter

items.title: Low jobless claims point to further decline in unemployment rate and improved labor market
items.description: Businesses aren’t hiring much, but they’re not resorting to big layoffs, either.

items.title: Micron’s stock pops. Here’s what an executive said to calm nervous investors.
items.description: The memory-chip maker’s HBM4 is in high-volume production and has started shipping to customers, CFO Mark Murphy said.
